_comment: TEMPLATE — paste this into Apify Console -> actor/task -> Integrations -> Webhooks -> Payload template. It is NOT auto-deployed; this repo ships no credentials. All {{...}} tokens are Apify webhook variables resolved at dispatch time (https://docs.apify.com/platform/integrations/webhooks/actions). Register the webhook URL as https://YOUR_HOST/apify-webhook/<APIFY_WEBHOOK_SECRET> so the receiver can verify the URL secret.
